title: bc-storyboard on dev dashboard with docker backend
description: Cold-start top-level health profile for the full DEV Storyboard + BaseConnect onboarding path with frontend runtime configured against the Docker/local backend stack. Reuses the shared Storyboard/dashboard cold-start health template while keeping the Docker backend branch independent from staging.

runLocation.source: dashboard server initiating delegated cross-surface probes

checks.repairHint: Repair the failing child group owner: bc-frontend docker runtime, bc-storyboard source/provider health, ddev dashboard/tunnel/remote-storyboard route, or fast health/check-all summary. Docker repair actions must declare the Docker host/container affected; no fake repair button is exposed here.
